LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DIRECTV LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF DEFENDANTS IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.
REPLY TO OPPOS TO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY DEFENDANT DIRECTV LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIRECTV LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER AND THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY IDENTIFY THE DATE AND GENERAL VICINITY OF THE ASSAULT/BATTERY/TRESPASS. DEFENDANT CAN REASONABLY RESPOND TO THE PLEADING. DISCOVERY WILL REVEAL FURTHER DETAIL AND THE COURT LIBERALLY CONSTRUES THE COMPLAINT PER CCP 452. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT DIRECTV LLC
